    • PacketHandlerCodec

      protected PacketHandlerCodec(int priority, String id, EnumMap<ProtocolState, PacketHandlerStateCodec<? extends Session>> stateCodecs, Predicate<Session> activePredicate)
      Creates a new PacketHandlerCodec instance.
      参数:
      priority - For inbound packets, higher priority codecs are invoked first For outbound packets, lower priority codecs are invoked first
      id -
      stateCodecs -
      activePredicate -
